description: Patient Bonifacio Caput presents to Dr. Cameron Cordara's clinic with confirmed fasting glucose readings of 142 mg/dL and 138 mg/dL on two separate occasions, establishing a new diagnosis of Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus. Complete the full initial diabetes workup in GNU Health. The end state must have all of the following for Bonifacio Caput: (1) an active Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus condition record (ICD-10 E11); (2) Penicillin allergy documented (severity: Severe, reaction: Anaphylaxis); (3) a GLYCATED HEMOGLOBIN (HbA1c) lab test order; (4) a Metformin prescription with Dr. Cordara as prescriber; (5) a follow-up appointment with Dr. Cordara within 35-60 days from today. Login: admin / gnusolidario.
